scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,bridge,vue" -c "blueBright,greenBright,cyanBright" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix mcp-server" "npm run dev --prefix mcp-bridge" "npm run dev --prefix vue-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix mcp-server && npm run build --prefix mcp-bridge && npm run build --prefix vue-frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n "server,bridge,vue" -c "blueBright,greenBright,cyanBright" "npm run start --prefix mcp-server" "npm run start --prefix mcp-bridge" "npm run preview --prefix vue-frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix mcp-server && npm install --prefix mcp-bridge && npm install --prefix vue-frontend
